software_system.name: Health Manager Service
software_system.description: Medical appointment and healthcare management microservice handling patient appointments, practitioner schedules, clinical consultations, medical records, prescriptions, billing, and integrations with external healthcare systems. Core service for managing healthcare encounters and clinical workflows in a telemedicine platform.

software_items.name: Health Manager System
software_items.description: Complete health manager microservice providing appointment management, practitioner workflows, patient interactions, and clinical data management

software_items.name: REST API Layer
software_items.description: RESTful HTTP controllers exposing appointment, practitioner, patient, and clinical data endpoints across v1, v2, and v3 API versions

software_items.name: v1 Controllers
software_items.description: Version 1 REST endpoints for appointments, practitioners, patients, consultations, prescriptions, ratings, shifts, and billing. 69 controller classes providing core healthcare operations.

software_items.name: AppointmentController
software_items.description: Core appointment management endpoints: create, update, cancel, handover, state transitions. Handles HANDOVER_PROPOSE, HANDOVER_ACCEPT, HANDOVER_DENY, HANDOVER_CANCEL actions.

software_items.name: ClinicAppointmentController
software_items.description: Clinic-facing appointment list endpoints for practitioners, filtering by status, care unit, date ranges, and practitioner assignments

software_items.name: PatientAppointmentController
software_items.description: Patient-facing appointment endpoints: view upcoming appointments, historical appointments, appointment details

software_items.name: AppointmentNoteController
software_items.description: Clinical note management for appointments: create, update, view clinical notes, structured data capture

software_items.name: PractitionerController
software_items.description: Practitioner profile and status endpoints: online status, shifts, preferences, statistics

software_items.name: EpisodeOfCareController
software_items.description: Episode of care management: create, view, update healthcare episodes linking related appointments

software_items.name: ReferralController
software_items.description: Medical referral management: create, update, send referrals to external care providers

software_items.name: BillingListController
software_items.description: Billing and invoicing endpoints: generate billing reports, export CSV, filter by date/practitioner/care unit

software_items.name: v2 Controllers
software_items.description: Version 2 REST endpoints with enhanced functionality and breaking changes from v1

software_items.name: v3 Controllers
software_items.description: Version 3 REST endpoints with latest API improvements and additions

software_items.name: System Controllers
software_items.description: System administration endpoints: data erasure, troubleshooting, system configuration

software_items.name: Service Layer
software_items.description: Business logic layer implementing healthcare workflows, appointment orchestration, handover processes, clinical data management, and external system integrations. 101 service classes.

software_items.name: AppointmentHandoverService
software_items.description: Handover state machine implementation: proposeHandover, acceptHandover, denyHandover, cancelHandover. Manages practitioner transfers with validation, notifications, and audit trail. 432 lines of core business logic.

software_items.name: UpdateAppointmentService
software_items.description: Appointment update orchestration: coordinates state changes, handover actions, cancellations, practitioner assignments

software_items.name: PatientAppointmentService
software_items.description: Patient-specific appointment operations: retrieve patient appointments, apply patient privacy rules, enrich appointment data

software_items.name: RequestAppointmentV3Service
software_items.description: Appointment request processing: validate requests, assign practitioners, create appointments, handle scheduling rules

software_items.name: ConsultationService
software_items.description: Clinical consultation management: start/end consultations, record clinical data, manage consultation state

software_items.name: ClinicAppointmentListService
software_items.description: Clinic appointment list queries using QueryDSL: filter by status, date, practitioner, care unit. Implements complex query building for clinic pages.

software_items.name: AppointmentNoteService
software_items.description: Clinical note management: create, update, fetch notes, handle structured note templates, export to external systems

software_items.name: PractitionerService
software_items.description: Practitioner management: online status tracking, shift management, capability management, practitioner resolution

software_items.name: EpisodeOfCareService
software_items.description: Episode of care lifecycle management: create episodes, link appointments, expire episodes, track care continuity

software_items.name: ReferralService
software_items.description: Medical referral processing: create referrals, route to external systems (BokaDoktorn, EuroAccident, SEB), track referral status

software_items.name: BillingListReportGenerator
software_items.description: Billing report generation: aggregate appointment billing data, generate CSV exports, apply pricing rules

software_items.name: DataErasureService
software_items.description: GDPR data erasure: anonymize patient data, delete appointments, maintain referential integrity

software_items.name: TakeCareNoteService
software_items.description: TakeCare EHR integration: transfer clinical notes to TakeCare system, map data structures, handle X.509 authentication

software_items.name: Repository Layer
software_items.description: Data access layer implementing JPA repositories and QueryDSL queries for all domain entities. 48 repository interfaces.

software_items.name: AppointmentRepository
software_items.description: JPA repository for Appointment entity: CRUD operations, custom queries for appointment retrieval by patient, practitioner, date ranges

software_items.name: AppointmentHandoverProcessRepository
software_items.description: Repository for active handover processes: findByAppointmentId, UNIQUE constraint enforcement on appointment_id

software_items.name: AppointmentHandoverEventRepository
software_items.description: Repository for immutable handover audit events: persist state transitions, query event history

software_items.name: ConsultationRepository
software_items.description: Repository for clinical consultation entities: track consultation lifecycle, link to appointments

software_items.name: QueryableAppointmentRepository
software_items.description: QueryDSL repository for complex appointment queries: dynamic filtering, pagination, sorting for clinic lists

software_items.name: AppointmentNoteRepository
software_items.description: Repository for clinical notes attached to appointments: store structured note data, versions, templates

software_items.name: ShiftRepository
software_items.description: Repository for practitioner shift schedules: query shifts by date range, practitioner, care unit

software_items.name: EpisodeOfCareEntityRepository
software_items.description: Repository for episode of care entities: manage care continuity, link related appointments

software_items.name: ReferralRepository
software_items.description: Repository for medical referrals: persist referral data, track routing to external systems

software_items.name: TakeCareNoteRepository
software_items.description: Repository for TakeCare note transfer tracking: log transfer status, handle retries

software_items.name: Domain Model Layer
software_items.description: JPA entity classes representing healthcare domain model: appointments, practitioners, patients, clinical data, billing. 120 entity classes.

software_items.name: Appointment Entity
software_items.description: Core appointment aggregate root: patient, practitioner, care unit, status, timestamps, handover relationship (OneToOne with AppointmentHandoverProcess)

software_items.name: AppointmentHandoverProcess Entity
software_items.description: Active handover process state: owner, target practitioner/role/care unit, status (HANDOVER_PROPOSED), notes. UNIQUE constraint on appointment_id.

software_items.name: AppointmentHandoverEvent Entity
software_items.description: Immutable audit event for handover state transitions: old status, new status, user, timestamp, handover details. Provides audit trail.

software_items.name: Consultation Entity
software_items.description: Clinical consultation session: start time, end time, practitioner, patient, clinical data captured

software_items.name: AppointmentNote Entity
software_items.description: Clinical note attached to appointment: structured/unstructured content, template, version, author

software_items.name: Shift Entity
software_items.description: Practitioner work shift: start/end time, care unit, availability status

software_items.name: EpisodeOfCareEntity
software_items.description: Episode of care linking related appointments: patient, care provider, start/end dates, status

software_items.name: Referral Entity
software_items.description: Medical referral to external care provider: patient, diagnosis, attachments, routing information

software_items.name: TakeCareNote Entity
software_items.description: TakeCare note transfer tracking: note content, transfer status, transfer timestamp, error information

software_items.name: External Service Clients
software_items.description: REST/SOAP clients for external microservices: directory, bookings, meetingplace, interviewer, notifier, payment, careprovidersетр. Implements resilience patterns.

software_items.name: DirectoryService Client
software_items.description: Directory service client: validate practitioners, resolve practitioner details, check practitioner validity for handovers

software_items.name: NotifierClient
software_items.description: Notifier service client: send clinic notifications (handover proposed, handover responded), push notifications to practitioners

software_items.name: MeetingPlaceService Client
software_items.description: MeetingPlace service client: send handover messages to patient chat, add practitioners to video meetings, manage meeting participants

software_items.name: InterviewerService Client
software_items.description: Interviewer service client: fetch patient interview data, medical history, triage information for appointment context

software_items.name: BookingsService Client
software_items.description: Bookings service client: fetch third-party bookings, synchronize external appointments

software_items.name: PaymentClient
software_items.description: Payment service client: process payments, handle Klarna integration, manage payment orders

software_items.name: Directory2Service Client
software_items.description: Directory2 service client: patient demographics, relationships, consents, guardian information

software_items.name: Event Publishing Layer
software_items.description: JMS event publishers for integration events: handover events, appointment events, consultation events, credit events, referral events

software_items.name: AppointmentEventSender
software_items.description: JMS event publisher: sends AppointmentHandoverStatusEvent to appointmentHandoverEventTopic on all handover state transitions (PROPOSED, ACCEPTED, DENIED, CANCELLED)

software_items.name: Event Listener Layer
software_items.description: JMS event listeners consuming events from external services: booking synchronization, meeting messages, patient updates, payment updates

software_items.name: MessageEventListener
software_items.description: Listens to messageEventTopic from MeetingPlace: processes chat messages, updates appointment context with patient communications

software_items.name: SynchronizedBookingListener
software_items.description: Listens to synchronizedBookingV2Topic from Bookings service: synchronizes third-party bookings into health-manager appointments

software_items.name: Configuration Layer
software_items.description: Spring configuration beans: JMS, async processing, caching, web interceptors, external client configuration, Blaze Persistence setup

software_items.name: JmsConfiguration
software_items.description: JMS configuration: Artemis broker connection, topic/queue setup, message converters

software_items.name: AsyncConfiguration
software_items.description: Async processing configuration: thread pools, @Async support, executor services

software_items.name: CacheConfig
software_items.description: Caching configuration: Caffeine cache setup, TTL configurations, cache names for appointments, practitioners, authorization

interfaces.name: Health Manager REST API v1
interfaces.error_handling: Standard HTTP status codes: 400 Bad Request, 404 Not Found, 500 Internal Server Error. HealthManagerException mapped to appropriate HTTP responses.

interfaces.name: Health Manager REST API v2
interfaces.error_handling: Standard HTTP status codes with enhanced error details

interfaces.name: Health Manager REST API v3
interfaces.error_handling: Standard HTTP status codes with enhanced error details

interfaces.name: Appointment Handover Event Topic
interfaces.error_handling: JMS broker handles message delivery, retry on failure

interfaces.name: Directory Service API
interfaces.error_handling: HTTP client retries, circuit breaker pattern

interfaces.name: Notifier Service API
interfaces.error_handling: HTTP client retries, async notification with best effort delivery

interfaces.name: MeetingPlace Service API
endpoints: POST /message - Send handover message to patient chat

interfaces.name: Payment Service API
interfaces.error_handling: HTTP client retries, idempotency for payment operations

interfaces.name: Directory2 Service API
interfaces.error_handling: HTTP client retries, cached patient data

interfaces.name: TakeCare EHR Integration
interfaces.error_handling: SOAP fault handling, retry with exponential backoff, X.509 certificate validation
endpoints: CaseNoteWrite - Transfer clinical notes to TakeCare

interfaces.name: CareProviders Service API
interfaces.error_handling: HTTP client retries, cached care provider data

interfaces.name: System Configuration Service API
endpoints: GET /customizations - Get feature flags and customizations

interfaces.name: MeetingPlace Message Event Topic
interfaces.error_handling: JMS listener with transaction rollback on processing failure

interfaces.name: Synchronized Booking Event Topic
interfaces.error_handling: JMS listener with transaction rollback on processing failure

soup_components.name: Spring Boot
soup_components.purpose: Application framework providing dependency injection, web framework, data access, security, and integration capabilities
soup_components.verification: Integration tests validate Spring framework behavior. Framework widely used in production medical device software.
functional_requirements: Handle HTTP request routing and processing
Manage database transactions with ACID guarantees

performance_requirements.timing: REST endpoint response time < 500ms for 95th percentile

hardware_requirements.cpu: Multi-core processor recommended for thread pool execution
hardware_requirements.memory: Minimum 2GB heap memory, 4GB recommended for production

soup_components.name: Hibernate ORM / Spring Data JPA
soup_components.purpose: Object-relational mapping framework for persisting Java entities to MySQL database
anomalies: N+1 query problem requires careful query optimization
LazyInitializationException if entities accessed outside transaction
soup_components.verification: Integration tests with H2 database validate JPA mappings. Repository tests verify CRUD operations.
functional_requirements: Persist entity state to relational database
Support JPQL and native SQL queries

performance_requirements.timing: Database query execution < 100ms for simple queries
performance_requirements.capacity: Handle tables with millions of rows

hardware_requirements.memory: Entity cache and query plan cache require 512MB-1GB

soup_components.name: MySQL Connector/J and MariaDB Java Client
soup_components.purpose: JDBC drivers for MySQL/MariaDB database connectivity
anomalies: Connection timeout handling requires explicit configuration (configured at 5 seconds)
soup_components.verification: Database integration tests validate connectivity and query execution
functional_requirements: Establish TCP connection to MySQL/MariaDB server
Support prepared statements with parameter binding

performance_requirements.throughput: Support connection pool of 100 connections (configured max)

soup_components.name: Spring JMS / Apache Artemis
soup_components.purpose: JMS messaging for asynchronous event publishing and consumption
anomalies: Message redelivery on listener failure requires idempotent message handling
soup_components.verification: Integration tests validate message publishing and consumption. Event processing verified with test containers.

soup_components.name: QueryDSL
soup_components.purpose: Type-safe query construction for complex JPA queries
soup_components.verification: Unit tests validate query construction. Integration tests verify query execution against database.
functional_requirements: Support dynamic query construction based on runtime filters
Generate efficient SQL for complex joins

dependencies: APT code generation at build time

soup_components.name: Jackson CSV
soup_components.purpose: CSV serialization for billing report exports
soup_components.verification: Unit tests validate CSV output format and encoding
functional_requirements: Serialize billing data to CSV format

soup_components.name: TakeCare Client Library
soup_components.purpose: Integration with TakeCare EHR system for clinical note transfer
functionality_used: SOAP client for TakeCare web services
anomalies: X.509 certificate expiration requires manual renewal
SOAP fault handling requires specific error parsing
soup_components.verification: Integration tests with TakeCare test environment. X.509 certificate validation in staging.
functional_requirements: Authenticate with TakeCare using X.509 certificates
Submit clinical notes in TakeCare format
Map internal user IDs to TakeCare user IDs

soup_components.name: Lombok
soup_components.purpose: Annotation processor for boilerplate code generation (getters, setters, builders, constructors)
soup_components.verification: Compile-time code generation. Delombok plugin generates source for javadoc verification.
functional_requirements: Generate boilerplate methods at compile time
Reduce code duplication in entity classes
Support builder pattern for immutable objects

soup_components.name: Apache CXF
soup_components.purpose: SOAP web service client framework for TakeCare and efrikort integrations
soup_components.verification: Integration tests with SOAP endpoints. WS-Security configuration validated in test environment.
functional_requirements: Generate SOAP client from WSDL definition
Marshal Java objects to SOAP XML
Unmarshal SOAP XML responses to Java objects

soup_components.name: Caffeine Cache
soup_components.purpose: High-performance in-memory caching for practitioners, appointments, authorization checks
soup_components.verification: Cache hit/miss metrics monitored via Actuator. Integration tests validate cache behavior.
functional_requirements: Store frequently accessed data in memory
Limit cache size to prevent memory exhaustion

performance_requirements.capacity: Configurable max cache entries (typically 1000-10000 per cache)

hardware_requirements.memory: Cache size dependent on max entries and object size. Typical: 100MB-500MB total across all caches

soup_components.name: Flyway
soup_components.verification: Migration scripts tested in integration test environment. Rollback procedures documented.
functional_requirements: Apply database schema changes in version order
Track applied migrations in flyway_schema_history_v2 table
Support baseline migration for existing databases

soup_components.name: Blaze Persistence
soup_components.purpose: Advanced JPA query features for complex queries and pagination
soup_components.verification: Integration tests validate entity views and pagination performance
functional_requirements: Optimize JPA queries for large result sets
Enable entity view projections for DTOs
Integrate with QueryDSL for query building

performance_requirements.throughput: Support paginated list queries at scale
performance_requirements.capacity: Handle result sets with 100,000+ rows efficiently

soup_components.name: Klarna Checkout SDKs
soup_components.purpose: Payment processing integration with Klarna payment provider
anomalies: API version compatibility requires careful configuration
soup_components.verification: Integration tests with Klarna sandbox environment. Payment flow verified in staging.

performance_requirements.capacity: Handle payment amounts up to 10,000 SEK

hardware_requirements.other: Network connectivity to Klarna API servers

soup_components.name: Apache PDFBox
soup_components.purpose: PDF generation and manipulation for medical documents
soup_components.verification: Unit tests validate PDF output. Manual review of generated PDFs.
functional_requirements: Generate PDF documents from medical data

performance_requirements.timing: PDF generation for typical document < 2 seconds

dependencies: Font files if custom fonts used

soup_components.name: Easy Rules
soup_components.purpose: Business rules engine for appointment assignment and routing logic
soup_components.verification: Unit tests validate rule definitions and execution logic
functional_requirements: Define business rules for appointment routing
Execute rules based on appointment context

soup_components.name: ShedLock
soup_components.purpose: Distributed lock for scheduled tasks to prevent duplicate execution in clustered environment
anomalies: Lock expiration requires careful configuration to prevent task overlap or starvation
soup_components.verification: Integration tests validate single task execution in multi-instance environment
functional_requirements: Ensure scheduled tasks execute only once across cluster

mechanisms.description: Health-manager runs as independent microservice with dedicated JVM process, isolated from other platform services
Deployed in Kubernetes pod with resource limits (CPU, memory) and network isolation via service mesh
Dedicated MySQL database schema with access controlled via unique credentials. No shared tables with other services.
Spring @Transactional annotations enforce ACID properties for database operations. Handover operations execute in single transaction to prevent partial state.
JWT-based authentication with role-based access control. Security interceptors validate user permissions before controller method execution.
Controller layer validates all input DTOs. Service layer enforces business rule validation (practitioner validity, care unit validation, handover state machine constraints).

failure_propagation_controls: Circuit breaker pattern on external service clients prevents cascading failures
JMS message listener transactions rollback on processing failure, preventing data corruption
Database constraints (UNIQUE, NOT NULL, FK) prevent invalid state persistence
Exception handling at controller layer prevents stack trace exposure to clients
Scheduled task execution isolated via ShedLock prevents resource exhaustion from duplicate execution
Connection pool limits prevent database connection exhaustion
Cache size limits prevent memory exhaustion from unbounded cache growth

architectural_patterns: Domain-Driven Design (Aggregate roots, entities, value objects, domain events)
Event-Driven Architecture (JMS topics for integration events)
Service Orchestration (Service layer coordinates external calls and transactions)
State Machine (Handover status transitions with explicit state validation)
CQRS-lite (Separate read models via QueryDSL for complex queries)
Dual Audit Pattern (Database event log + JMS event publication)

components.name: health-manager-service
components.description: Spring Boot application deployed as Kubernetes deployment with multiple replicas for high availability. Exposed via Kubernetes service and ingress.
components.scaling: Horizontal pod autoscaling based on CPU and memory metrics
components.monitoring: Prometheus metrics exported via Actuator endpoints, logs aggregated via ELK stack

components.name: health-manager-database
components.description: MySQL 8.0 or MariaDB managed database service with automated backups, replication for high availability
components.scaling: Vertical scaling for database resources, read replicas for read-heavy workloads
components.monitoring: Database metrics via cloud provider monitoring, slow query logs

components.name: artemis-broker
components.description: Apache Artemis JMS broker deployed in Kubernetes for event messaging. Configured for topic-based pub/sub.
components.monitoring: Artemis metrics via JMX, message queue depth monitoring

verification_evidence.architecture_implements_requirements: handover_architecture.md Section 12 provides traceability from software requirements to architectural components
verification_evidence.risk_control_implementation: handover_architecture.md Section 10 maps architectural controls to identified risks R01-R12
verification_evidence.interface_documentation: All external service interfaces documented with DTOs, protocols, error handling strategies
verification_evidence.soup_requirements_specified: All SOUP components include functional requirements, performance requirements, hardware requirements, software environment per IEC 62304 5.3.3-5.3.4

notes: This architecture extraction focuses on the complete health-manager microservice system, not just the handover feature
120 domain entities represent rich healthcare domain model
101 service classes implement complex healthcare workflows and business logic
48 repository interfaces provide data access layer
69 controllers across 3 API versions (v1, v2, v3) provide extensive REST API surface
Extensive external integrations: directory, bookings, meetingplace, interviewer, notifier, payment, directory2, careproviders, TakeCare EHR, Klarna
Safety class B classification requires comprehensive verification per IEC 62304 clause 5.6
Architecture supports regulated medical device software with audit trails, GDPR compliance, and regulatory traceability
